title: stoechas pinnata
intro: Stoechas pinnata, also known as the cotton lavender or tree lavender, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. Its leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine, and it is known for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The leaves and flowers of the Stoechas pinnata plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in potpourri and sachets.
